inputs.label: Bending Moment
inputs.businessContext: Applied bending moment at the section of interest.

businessContext_i18n.en: Applied bending moment at the section of interest.

inputs.label: Section Modulus

inputs.label: Distance from Neutral Axis

businessContext_i18n.tr: Nötr eksenden gerilmenin maksimum olduğu en uç lifteki mesafe.

inputs.label: Moment of Inertia
inputs.businessContext: Second moment of area about the neutral axis.

businessContext_i18n.en: Second moment of area about the neutral axis.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Nötr eksene göre alanın ikinci momenti.
